languages.original_text: "Hmm... The Sector Bionica has become more attentive to the augmentations of senior officers. After my last ocular lens revision, my nightly headaches have practically disappeared."

languages.text: "Кхм... В Секторе Бионика стали внимательней относиться к аугментациям старшего офицерского состава. После последней ревизии окуляра головная боль по вечерам меня почти не мучает".
"Hmm... The Sector Bionica has become more attentive to the augmentations of senior officers. After my last ocular lens revision, my nightly headaches have practically disappeared."
languages.original_text: "Кхм... В Секторе Бионика стали внимательней относиться к аугментациям старшего офицерского состава. После последней ревизии окуляра головная боль по вечерам меня почти не мучает".

traits.locale_text: "Hmm... The Sector Bionica has become more attentive to the augmentations of senior officers. After my last ocular lens revision, my nightly headaches have practically disappeared."
"Hmm... The Sector Bionica has become more attentive to the augmentations of senior officers. After my last ocular lens revision, my nightly headaches have practically disappeared."
"Hmm... The Sector Bionica has become more attentive to the augmentations of senior officers. After my last ocular lens revision, my nightly headaches have practically disappeared."

languages.text: 「うーん…セクター・ビオニカは、高官の強化に注意を払うようになった。私の最後の眼球レンズの改修後、夜間の頭痛はほとんど消えた」
languages.original_text: "Hmm... The Sector Bionica has become more attentive to the augmentations of senior officers. After my last ocular lens revision, my nightly headaches have practically disappeared."

traits.locale_text: 「うーん…セクター・ビオニカは、高官の強化に注意を払うようになった。私の最後の眼球レンズの改修後、夜間の頭痛はほとんど消えた。」

languages.text: « Hmm… Le secteur Bionica s'occupe maintenant des augmentations des officiers supérieurs avec un soin accru. Depuis la dernière révision de mon lorgnon mécanique, les migraines qui m'assaillaient tous les soirs ont quasiment disparu. »
languages.original_text: "Hmm... The Sector Bionica has become more attentive to the augmentations of senior officers. After my last ocular lens revision, my nightly headaches have practically disappeared."

traits.locale_text: « Hmm… Le secteur Bionica s'occupe maintenant des augmentations des officiers supérieurs avec un soin accru. Depuis la dernière révision de mon lorgnon mécanique, les migraines qui m'assaillaient tous les soirs ont quasiment disparu. »

languages.text: "Hmm ... Der Sektor Bionica ist jetzt achtsamer hinsichtlich der Augmentationen leitender Offiziere. Seit der letzten Wartung meiner Okularlinse sind meine nächtlichen Kopfschmerzen praktisch verschwunden."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... The Sector Bionica has become more attentive to the augmentations of senior officers. After my last ocular lens revision, my nightly headaches have practically disappeared."

traits.locale_text: "Hmm ... Der Sektor Bionica ist jetzt achtsamer hinsichtlich der Augmentationen leitender Offiziere. Seit der letzten Wartung meiner Okularlinse sind meine nächtlichen Kopfschmerzen praktisch verschwunden."

languages.text: "Hım... Sektör Biyonika, kıdemli subayların ogmentasyonlarına daha bir özen gösterir oldu. Son oküler mercek revizyonumdan sonra geceleri çektiğim baş ağrıları yok olup gitti."
languages.original_text: "Hmm... The Sector Bionica has become more attentive to the augmentations of senior officers. After my last ocular lens revision, my nightly headaches have practically disappeared."

traits.locale_text: "Hım... Sektör Biyonika, kıdemli subayların ogmentasyonlarına daha bir özen gösterir oldu. Son oküler mercek revizyonumdan sonra geceleri çektiğim baş ağrıları yok olup gitti."

languages.text: «Hum... El Sector Bionica se está esmerando con los aumentos de los oficiales veteranos. Tras la última revisión de mi lente ocular, ya no sufro de migrañas por las noches».
languages.original_text: "Hmm... The Sector Bionica has become more attentive to the augmentations of senior officers. After my last ocular lens revision, my nightly headaches have practically disappeared."

traits.locale_text: «Hum... El Sector Bionica se está esmerando con los aumentos de los oficiales veteranos. Tras la última revisión de mi lente ocular, ya no sufro de migrañas por las noches».

languages.text: “嗯……仿生区如今对高阶军官的植入物更为重视了。自从我上次做完目镜升级，晚上头疼的毛病几乎没再犯过。”
languages.original_text: "Hmm... The Sector Bionica has become more attentive to the augmentations of senior officers. After my last ocular lens revision, my nightly headaches have practically disappeared."

traits.locale_text: “嗯……仿生区如今对高阶军官的植入物更为重视了。自从我上次做完目镜升级，晚上头疼的毛病几乎没再犯过。”
